batch_result.batch:
del cliptextencodesdxl
del cliptextencodesdxl_2
positive_enc = CLIPTextEncode(text="masterpiece, best quality", clip=checkpointloadersimple.CLIP, near=checkpointloadersimple)
negative_enc = CLIPTextEncode(text="lowres, bad anatomy, worst quality", clip=checkpointloadersimple.CLIP, near=checkpointloadersimple)
ksampler.positive = positive_enc.CONDITIONING
ksampler.negative = negative_enc.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.positive = positive_enc.CONDITIONING
ksampler_2.negative = negative_enc.CONDITIONING
done()
